instruction: Convert this scanner output into a structured pentest finding.
input: sqlmap: parameter 'id' (GET) is vulnerable, boolean-based blind, back-end DBMS MySQL
output: {"title": "SQL Injection in id parameter", "surface": "web", "severity": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H", "evidence": "sqlmap confirmed boolean-based blind injection on GET id, MySQL back-end", "remediation": "Use parameterised queries / prepared statements."}

instruction: Convert this scanner output into a structured pentest finding.
input: nikto: /admin/ directory has directory indexing enabled
output: {"title": "Directory listing enabled on /admin/", "surface": "web", "severity": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N", "evidence": "nikto reported autoindex on /admin/", "remediation": "Disable directory indexing (Options -Indexes)."}

instruction: Convert this scanner output into a structured pentest finding.
input: nmap: 445/tcp open microsoft-ds, host is Windows Server 2008 R2, MS17-010 likely
output: {"title": "SMB RCE (MS17-010 / EternalBlue) on 445", "surface": "network", "severity": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H", "evidence": "nmap smb-vuln-ms17-010 flagged 445/tcp on Windows Server 2008 R2", "remediation": "Apply MS17-010 patch and disable SMBv1."}

instruction: Convert this scanner output into a structured pentest finding.
output: {"title": "Valid domain credentials with local admin on 10.0.0.5", "surface": "ad", "severity": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N", "evidence": "crackmapexec authenticated CORP\\admin:hunter2 with admin (Pwn3d!) on 10.0.0.5", "remediation": "Rotate credential, enforce least privilege and MFA."}

instruction: Convert this scanner output into a structured pentest finding.
output: {"title": "Exposed database backup at /backup/db.sql", "surface": "web", "severity": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N", "evidence": "ffuf found /backup/db.sql returning HTTP 200, 148KB", "remediation": "Remove backups from web root; restrict access."}

instruction: Convert this scanner output into a structured pentest finding.
output: {"title": "Missing X-Frame-Options header", "surface": "web", "severity": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N", "evidence": "nikto reported X-Frame-Options absent", "remediation": "Set X-Frame-Options: DENY or a CSP frame-ancestors directive."}

instruction: Convert this scanner output into a structured pentest finding.
output: {"title": "RDP exposed without Network Level Authentication", "surface": "network", "severity": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L", "evidence": "nmap found 3389/tcp open with NLA disabled", "remediation": "Enable NLA, restrict RDP to VPN, apply account lockout."}

instruction: Convert this scanner output into a structured pentest finding.
input: bloodhound: user JSMITH has DCSync rights on domain CORP.LOCAL
output: {"title": "Non-tier-0 user JSMITH holds DCSync rights", "surface": "ad", "severity": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H", "evidence": "BloodHound shows JSMITH with GetChanges/GetChangesAll on CORP.LOCAL", "remediation": "Remove replication rights from non-tier-0 principals; audit ACLs."}
